evals.name: trigger-icon-usage
evals.prompt: How do I add a search icon to a text field and a plus icon to a button in this project?

assertions.text: Uses :prepend-inner-icon or :append-inner-icon for v-text-field and :prepend-icon or :icon for v-btn
Does NOT use string class names like 'mdi-magnify'

evals.name: trigger-find-icon
evals.prompt: Where do I find available icon names, and how does an icon name map to its import?

assertions.text: Explains the import is the camelCase name prefixed with mdi (e.g. account-circle -> mdiAccountCircle)

evals.name: negative-theming-color
evals.prompt: How do I configure the light and dark theme colors for the app?

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vuetify-icons; routes to vuetify-theming instead
